title: Review: idiomatic Rust API improvements
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — The only real inconsistency is push_subscription_set naming. No correctness bugs, no security surface, no API lock-in beyond the BodyType enum (which is well-designed). Single breaking risk: BodyType replaces &str in MessageCreateInput, callers must update.
Confidence: 95% chance of no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: push_subscription_set logic (duplicate check + two passes over cp slice) not explicitly tested for the case where cp is empty. Would raise confidence if: explicit test for empty chat_push slice and for push_subscription_set with duplicate accountId.
